description: As a Senior Developer, I was responsible for developing and maintaining software applications for the Leasing and Billing team. In addition to full-stack development, I assisted in managing projects by gathering requirements, facilitating communication with key stakeholders, architecting solutions and database structures, and providing guidance and support to team members.

Being a Developer on the Atria Software Engineering team allowed me to enhance my full-stack development knowledge and skills significantly. I had the opportunity to help design and develop new applications and enhancements to current systems, such as the company's Intranet. This role expanded my knowledge and understanding of how an application's architecture significantly impacts the app and any application that may interact with it.
